message:
test(fuzz): add can_drive_operation SafetyTier matrix fuzz (resolves kd60w)

ProvenanceRecord::can_drive_operation (provenance.rs:517-557) is the
SECURITY-CRITICAL decision matrix gating every operation on
(SafetyTier, taint_flags, integrity_label). A regression that flipped
a single check would let an attacker drive a Dangerous operation from
public/malicious input.

Decision matrix:
- Safe → always Ok
- Forbidden → always ForbiddenOperation
- Risky → reject Malicious; reject critical-taint w/ integrity<Work
- Dangerous/Critical (same path): reject in order PublicInput →
  Malicious → CrossZoneUnapproved → InsufficientIntegrity (<Work)

NOT covered by existing fuzz.

Seven properties driven over (integrity, taint_mask, tier) tuples
with the per-tier branch logic mirroring the documented matrix.

Once-gated regression anchors:
- (a) Safe with PublicInput → Ok
- (b) Forbidden → ForbiddenOperation
- (c) Dangerous+PublicInput+OwnerIntegrity → PublicInputForDangerousOperation
- (d) Dangerous+(PublicInput|Malicious) → PublicInputForDangerousOperation
  (gate ordering: PublicInput beats Malicious at provenance.rs:539)
- (e) Dangerous+clean+Untrusted → InsufficientIntegrity{Work, Untrusted}
- (f) Risky+Malicious → MaliciousInputDetected
- (g) Acceptance: Dangerous+clean+Work integrity → Ok (keeps rejection
  anchors non-vacuous)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -850,5 +850,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_can_drive_operation"
+path = "fuzz_targets/can_drive_operation.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
